title: bare-return
description: "Require explicit expressions in returns from functions with named results."
sidebar:
  badge:

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Require explicit expressions in returns from functions with named results.

## Bad

```go
func count() (n int) { n = 1; return }
```

## Good

```go
func count() (n int) { n = 1; return n }
```
